title: Cole Allen charged with attempted assassination of President Trump — 3 federal counts, faces life
snippet: Cole Allen charged Monday with: (1) attempting to assassinate the president, (2) using firearm during crime of violence, (3) transporting firearm interstate with intent to commit felony. Faces life in prison. Called self "Friendly Federal Assassin". Manifesto targeted admin officials "not including Mr. Patel". Detention hearing April 30.
